things.name: The Bund
things.description: Shanghai's legendary 1.5-km waterfront promenade lined with Art Deco colonial buildings facing the Pudong skyline

things.name: Shanghai Tower Observation Deck
things.description: Second tallest building in the world — the 118th floor sky walk offers vertiginous views over Pudong

things.name: Yu Garden (Yuyuan)
things.description: 16th-century classical Chinese garden with ornamental rockeries, pavilions and the famous zigzag bridge

things.name: Shanghai Museum
things.description: World-class collection of ancient Chinese bronzes, ceramics, calligraphy and jade — free admission

things.name: Former French Concession
things.description: Tree-lined streets of 1930s villas, jazz bars and boutiques — the most atmospheric neighbourhood in Shanghai

things.name: Tianzifang Arts District
things.description: Maze of shikumen alleys converted to galleries, independent cafes and artisan craft shops

things.name: Xintiandi
things.description: Restored 1920s shikumen (stone-gate house) district now home to upscale restaurants, bars and boutiques

things.name: Shanghai Disney Resort
things.description: The first Disney resort in mainland China — 6 themed lands with the world's tallest Disney castle

things.name: Zhujiajiao Water Town
things.description: Ming Dynasty canal town 50 km west of Shanghai — gondola rides, stone bridges and ancient temples

things.name: Maglev Train Experience
things.description: The world's fastest commercial train — 431 km/h from Pudong airport to Longyang Road Station in 8 minutes
